title: UltraSzerver Scoreboards
description: Easily track your progress and performance with this powerful scoreboard datapack for UltraSzerver. Stay updated on your achievements and see how you stack up against others as you play.
body:
UltraSzerver Scoreboards is a Minecraft datapack that brings a fully functional scoreboard system to your server. Watch your points, stats, achievements, and ranks grow over time. Both players and server admins can easily keep an eye on progress, celebrate milestones, and enjoy a bit of friendly competition along the way.

Current creators: TheRealItsNagol1718

New update every week, from the 5th of January, 2026, updates will be seasonly ([See on the discord server when is a new season](https://discord.com/invite/SYDyTQbQm8)) or if a issue will occure then we will update.
